title: The Establishment of the Tran Dynasty
summary: The unique transfer of power from the Ly to the Tran Dynasty, opening an era of the fiery 'Dong A' spirit.

slides.text: When the Ly Dynasty weakened, Queen Ly Chieu Hoang (the only queen regnant in our history) abdicated the throne to her husband, Tran Canh.
slides.imagePrompt: Young Queen Ly Chieu Hoang handing a golden scroll to young Tran Canh, both in royal robes, elegant palace setting, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In 1225, the Tran Dynasty officially began. This dynasty is famous for its spirit of unity and courage in protecting the country.
slides.imagePrompt: King Tran Thai Tong on the throne, with wise advisor Tran Thu Do standing nearby, strong and united look, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Under the Tran Dynasty, our country developed strongly in all aspects. In particular, the spirit of 'King and subject of one mind, brothers in harmony' was always upheld.
slides.imagePrompt: The King dining with his generals and citizens, a sense of equality and brotherhood, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The Tran Dynasty was ready to face the greatest challenges in history: the invasions by the powerful Mongol-Yuan army.
slides.imagePrompt: Soldiers training hard, sharpening swords, strong fortifications, atmosphere of readiness, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: Who was the only queen regnant in Vietnamese history?
What year did the Tran Dynasty begin?
